'''''Decisive''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] which served in the fleet of the [[Ciutric Hegemony]], when the self-proclaimed "[[Prince-Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]]" [[Delak Krennel]] took control of the region. In the [[Battle of Ciutric]], the ''Decisive'' surrendered to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] after Krennel was killed and his flagship [[Reckoning (Imperial II-class)|''Reckoning'']] was destroyed. When the Hegemony entered the New Republic, the ship and its crew were integrated into its defense force and remained at [[Ciutric IV]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
